sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. tiny food with serious nutrient density because seeds often overperform for their size. easy to sprinkle into meals because that practical versatility matters. usually brings decent fat support because that is one of the category strengths.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. calorie density still stacks up fast because tiny foods can still overshoot fast. real serving sizes are often small because some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice. texture or prep can be a barrier because not everyone uses seeds consistently.
